title: Xwin Girls Hair Salon Pretend Play Set - Beauty Salon Toys with Realistic Blow Straightener, Tool Bag & Styling Accessories
features: Complete Salon Set: This 14-piece set includes all the tools your little stylist needs straightener, scissors, comb, brush, and more—offering a full salon experience.

Interactive Role Play: Enhance your child's imaginative playtime with realistic tools that mimic a true salon experience, fostering creativity and boosting confidence as they role-play as professional stylists.
Safe & Durable Materials: Crafted from non-toxic, durable ABS plastic, ensuring long-lasting use and safety for your child during play.
Encourages Creativity & Learning: This pretend play set not only entertains but also helps develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and social skills.
Perfect Gift for Little Fashionistas: Ideal for birthdays, holidays, or just because, this beauty set will make any child feel like a professional stylist.
description: Product Description 14PCS Makeup Beauty Hair Toy Set! This all-in-one pretend play salon set is perfect for little stylists who love to imitate grown-ups. Designed with vibrant colours and realistic details, it includes everything a budding hairdresser needs to create fabulous hairstyles. From a working light-up straightener to essential accessories like combs, scissors, and rollers, this set provides endless hours of fun. Made from high-quality, child-safe materials, it encourages imaginative play while also helping to develop fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Encourages Creativity & Learning: This pretend play set not only entertains but also helps develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and social skills. Safe & Durable Materials: Crafted from non-toxic, durable ABS plastic, ensuring long-lasting use and safety for your child during play. Complete Salon Set: This 14-piece set includes all the tools your little stylist needs—straightener, scissors, comb, brush, and more—offering a full salon experience. Perfect Gift for Little Fashionistas: Ideal for birthdays, holidays, or just because this beauty set will make any child feel like a professional stylist. Recommended Age: 3 years and up Colour: Pink Straightener Power Source: 2 x AAA Batteries (not included) Educational Hair Stylist Toy 1 2 3 How many pieces are in the set, and what’s included? This 14-piece set includes all the tools your little stylist needs—straightener, scissors, comb, brush, and more—offering a full salon experience. How durable is the set for frequent play? The Pretend Makeup Toy Set is built to last, with sturdy, durable materials that can withstand regular use, making it a long-lasting addition to your child's playtime. Is the Pretend Makeup Toy Set safe for young children? Yes, the set is made from high-quality, non-toxic plastic materials, ensuring it is safe for children to use during play.
